name: CustomRankJoinMessage
author: AkmalKhair
description: ✨ A lightweight and customizable plugin to display rank-based join and leave messages on your PocketMine-MP server.
readme_markdown: # CustomRankJoinMessage > ✨ A lightweight and customizable plugin to display rank-based join and leave messages on your PocketMine-MP server. --- ## 🚀 Overview **CustomRankJoinMessage** enhances your Minecraft: Bedrock Edition server by showing **personalized join and leave messages** based on player ranks. Designed to work seamlessly with the [RankSystem](https://poggit.pmmp.io/p/RankSystem) plugin, it offers full customization and top performance — all without bloating your server. --- ## 🔥 Features ✅ **Rank-Specific Join Messages** Display unique messages when players join your server, tailored to their rank (e.g., VIP, Admin, Member). 🎨 **Full Customization** Customize the content, formatting, and color codes of your messages using Minecraft-style (§) formatting. Personalize messages to match your server's theme. 🔗 **RankSystem Integration** Define ranks and their corresponding messages in `config.yml`. When a player joins or leaves: - If their rank matches one in the config, the corresponding message is shown. - If no match is found, the default message will be displayed. ⚡ **Lightweight and Fast** Optimized for performance — no unnecessary processing, ensuring your server stays fast and responsive. --- ## 🛠️ Example Configuration Here's how you can configure your join and leave messages in `config.yml`: ```yaml join-messages: Admin: "§c[ADMIN] §fWelcome back, {player}!" VIP: "§e[VIP] §fThanks for your support, {player}!" Member: "§a[Member] §fGlad to see you, {player}!" default: "§7[+] Welcome to the server, {player}!" leave-messages: Admin: "§c[ADMIN] §f{player} has left the realm." VIP: "§e[VIP] §f{player} has left the server." Member: "§a[Member] §f{player} just logged out." default: "§7[-] {player} left the game."
